title: The cheapest input in the store is the one you never measured. — Daniel Fox
meta_description: What is the ROI of in-store experience? The highest-ratio lever is the music, already playing and nearly free to get right, and worth measuring against a control.

schema.headline: The cheapest input in the store is the one you never measured.
schema.description: What is the ROI of in-store experience? The highest-ratio lever is the music. It is already playing, costs almost nothing to get right, and the honest move is to measure it against a control.
